message:
fix(api): add unreadCount support to list response envelope

The notification list endpoint was passing unreadCount to sendList
but the shared types didn't include this field, causing it to be
silently dropped from responses.

Changes:
- Add unreadCount to ApiListResponse interface
- Add unreadCount to WrapListOptions interface
- Update wrapList to include unreadCount in response
- Update test to verify unreadCount is returned

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
